textByHashes.39f70c8f0800f6120462246d6b4c91c2aca3fe54: Sorry, but I can't stop to talk. That gryphon attack has caused more than a few problems that need sorting first.
textByHashes.f195804ac824521d1ae0ee7b4547ffc8dc42e8f3: Hello, human. Can I help you?
textByHashes.7a89d5ec311e4a5084e9b7dc99a093151cf0f65a: Ah, now that is something I can sort for you. I started making these at the suggestion of a human tourist. They're fashioned in the style of our own shells.
textByHashes.59d430730cb06f99a7fc26fab8b004eb52939710: We use them alongside our spears, but for a being of your size, wearing them on your back would work best.
textByHashes.3132fd814fb0d6f82ca9fe37dc2d2c69e5b98ec1: Precisely! Normally I would charge for one of these, but you claim the situation is urgent, and I trust you are not lying. As such, I will grant you one for free.
textByHashes.b1c539efb4eec5666a0a8cca6d8bae42675e3472: Do not lose it, human, for I won't be able to give you another for free. Any more will come at a cost.
textByHashes.5bc50b2ed3bc068b318efafae17ca3087750594f: Hello again, human. I assume you're here for that shield?
textByHashes.30eab08731f80434e1b911033c3be87b4bbe696d: Do not lose it, for I won't be able to give you another for free. Any more will come at a cost.
textByHashes.253bbb2e16e7556aedb19dd644ea5012bab1e193: Ah, human. Are you in need of a spear or shield?
textByHashes.919dec2e4c14e22b05452699dbb3990467e79fd2: I do. It is an important service I provide to our people. My spears in particular are quite desirable.
textByHashes.83779f63c55d59e1a640e4894914732f312cafe7: All tortugans must make their own spear as part of their Trial by Water, but those spears are quite personal and many prefer not to risk damaging them.
textByHashes.e7e53cd5972faaa78d8b8bbc74af8e6df2d038dc: My spears are of high quality, but lack the sentimental elements. They are seen as ideal by many tortugans. Would you like to buy one? Or perhaps you'd be more interested in something else I have for sale?
